title: TooFaster
description: This is a Minecraft Mod that removes the speed limit.
body:
This is a Minecraft Mod that removes the speed limit. 
I'm unsure why this happens, but it overrides the limitation in Minecraft that throws the "[Playername] moved too fast."  This is an updated replacement for that aspect of the [Random Patches](https://github.com/TheRandomLabs/RandomPatches) mod that has since been deprecated. Built for servers, **untested** in single player. This mod likely does the exact same thing as [Too Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/too-fast/versions), but Too Fast stopped receiving fabric updates and so I made a new one.
